_comment: Monotonic ratchet floor. Aether may only improve. These numbers are the FLOOR the gate enforces: the current build must meet or exceed them. When a self-teaching iteration ships a new detector, RAISE the matching number here in the same commit to lock the gain permanently (test_ratchet.py prints a reminder when current > floor). NEVER lower a number here — that is the one edit the ratchet cannot catch itself, and the agent contract forbids it. Removing a detector drops the current count below the floor and turns the gate red.
